resources.string: Your latest updates and reminders will show up here once they arrive.
Support is available for payments, shipping, and orders.
Invest in a Habit Invest in Gold
Phase 4 app shell is live. This shared container will host the real Home, Transactions, and Profile features as we migrate them.
Home migration foundation is in progress. Portfolio, savings, and recent activity are being rebuilt from the Android audit.
Rewards stays on the bottom bar in Android. We are keeping that product flow intact while the rewards and referral screens are rebuilt.
History stays on the bottom bar in Android. Transactions, status drilldowns, and invoices will be restored here next.
No successful, refund, or payout processing items found
No successful, refund, or payout processing sell items found
No successful or refund items found
Invest in a Habit. Invest in Gold.
By continuing, you agree to our
Enter a valid 6-digit pincode to continue.
We have sent a 6-digit code to
We need these details to set up your secure Gold account.
Must match your bank account records exactly.
We're syncing your HabitGold session before handing you off to the main app.
24K Gold, Usually delivered instantly can take upto 14 days via SafeGold
Get your money deposited to your bank account Usually instantly, but can take 24-48 hours
The shared Trade foundation is now live. The next slice will rebuild the full Android Buy flow from this verified route, state, and polling base.
24K 99.9% pure gold, securely stored with SafeGold
Earn 0.5% extra gold on every purchase
Max UPI limit is ₹1,00,000 per transaction
Select one to validate and apply.
Coupons are loaded from the shared Trade layer. Selection and validation will be wired into the final Buy parity pass.
SIP setup stays visible here because it is part of the real Android Buy surface. The final audited SIP setup UI will continue when the Trade and Savings phases connect.
Live price unavailable. Please wait a moment and try again.
We are verifying your payment with the bank. This usually takes around 30 seconds.
We are confirming your transaction status. Please do not close the app or go back.
Your payment was confirmed and the gold purchase has been completed successfully.
Your payment is still being processed. Please check the status again from the dashboard or transaction history shortly.
Your transaction could not be completed. Please try again.
Sell now enters through the correct Withdrawal Mode gateway. The next slice will rebuild the full Android Sell amount, payout, and outcome flow on top of this shared state.
Live sell price unavailable. Please wait a moment and try again.
Sell anytime and receive money directly to your UPI ID
Payout is sent to your verified UPI ID
Live sell price refreshes automatically when it expires
All your gold is under a holding period.
Fetching latest sell price. Please wait.
Fetching your gold balance. Please wait.
Amount exceeds your sellable gold balance.
No sellable balance available right now.
Sell request details are missing. Please enter the amount again.
The absolute total amount of gold currently in your vault from all previous buy transactions.
This is the gold that you have held for more than 48 hours and is currently available to be sold or redeemed.
Gold is kept under a 48-hour security holding period starting from the time of your last purchase before it becomes redeemable.
Payout will be sent to the selected UPI ID.
Please review the sell details before we execute your order.
Funds have been transferred to your UPI ID.
Something went wrong. You can try again from the sell screen.
Your gold sell order is being processed. The payout will reflect in your account within 24–48 hours. Track the status in Transaction History.
Check History for this order, or start a new sell from the dashboard when you are ready.
Get Coin continues in Phase 11. Trade now reaches the real Withdrawal Mode gateway first, and this route is preserved for later delivery migration.
VPA management is part of Trade parity and is still pending after the current Buy and Sell flows.
Trade help and payment FAQs still need their final shared help experience.
We could not find this transaction in the shared Trade history yet.
We could not load this transaction right now. Please try again.
This invoice link is invalid or unavailable.
Open this invoice using the system browser or document viewer on your device.
Track all your savings at a glance
Your recent activity will show up here.
We keep your gold in 100% Insured Vaults
Your gold will be delivered at free of cost
You get extra 0.5% gold on every purchase
Own 99.9%% pure, BIS-certified gold. The digital standard for physical value.
Stored in world-class Brink's vaults with periodic audits and 100%% insurance.
Sell instantly at live market rates or redeem into exquisite physical coins.
Gold has outpaced inflation, growing over 150%% in the last 5 years.
We could not load your gold value details right now.
We are here to help with your gold journey.
Browse the most common HabitGold questions around payments, savings, delivery, and redemption.
Our support team can help with orders, delivery, and account questions.
We could not find any FAQ matching your search yet.
Your digital gold is backed by 24K physical gold and stored in insured vaults through our trusted partners.
Can I sell my gold anytime?
Yes. You can sell your eligible gold instantly during supported market hours at the live sell price shown in the app.
Savings plans let you invest automatically on a daily, weekly, or monthly cadence so you can build gold gradually.
Where can I track my transactions?
You can review all completed and pending orders from the History section, including their latest status.
Profile, KYC, nominee, and security settings are planned in Phase 9. Home now hands off here through a real route boundary.
Alerts and notifications are planned under Phase 10. This route is now preserved from the Home toolbar for later feature wiring.
Savings setup, upgrades, and mandate-management continue in Phase 8. Home now hands off here through a dedicated route instead of a temporary message.
No visible autopay mandates found right now.
Pausing an autopay mandate will stop future auto investments until you resume it again.
Cancelled mandates cannot resume automatically. You may need to create a new savings plan later.
This mandate needs attention before it can start investing again.
Your auto-invest mandate is secured through BHIM UPI autopay. You stay in control and can pause or cancel it later from Manage Autopay.
Estimated growth at ~12%% annual return on your ₹%1$d %2$s investment.
Illustrative returns only. Actual growth may vary with live gold prices and market conditions.
Small daily steps can turn into real gold momentum.
Build a gold habit every single week.
Turn one monthly plan into growing gold milestones.
We are confirming your mandate with the bank. Please stay on this screen. Attempt %1$d of 6.
Your bank is still confirming the mandate. Please check back from the dashboard or Manage Autopay shortly.
%1$s Gold Savings is now active and future purchases will happen automatically.
We could not activate this savings plan right now. Please try again.
New UPI IDs are added automatically after a UPI payment.
Use your device biometrics to protect the app
Tell us what you need help with
Explain your issue here and our team will reach out to help.
Failed to send message. Please try again.
Unable to open the dialer right now.
WhatsApp is not available on this device.
Browse common questions across gold buying, selling, delivery, rewards, and auto save.
HabitGold is a digital platform that helps users build a saving habit by investing small amounts into 24K (99.99% pure) digital gold.
Is the gold on HabitGold real?
Yes. Every purchase of digital gold represents real gold of 24K (99.99% purity) that is securely stored on your behalf.
What is the minimum amount required to start?
You can start saving in gold on HabitGold with as little as ₹10.
The gold purchased through HabitGold is stored in secure vaults managed by authorized gold storage partner Safegold.
Can I sell my gold anytime?
Yes. You can sell your digital gold anytime through the HabitGold app based on the live selling price available on the platform.
Users can purchase digital gold through the app. The purchased gold is stored securely in 100% insured vaults and reflected in the user’s HabitGold account.
Any Indian resident with a valid mobile number and payment method can use HabitGold.
How do I create a HabitGold account?
You can create an account using your mobile number and complete a simple onboarding process within the app.
Digital gold allows users to buy real gold online in small amounts while the gold is stored securely in vaults.
What is the minimum amount required to buy gold?
You can buy digital gold starting from ₹10.
How is the gold price determined?
Gold prices are based on live market prices provided by authorized gold partners and may change throughout the day.
Habit Saving is a feature that allows users to automatically invest in gold at regular intervals.
Users can schedule automatic purchases of gold daily, weekly, or monthly.
Can I change my auto-save amount?
Yes. You can modify the saving amount anytime within the app.
How do I sell my digital gold?
You can sell your gold through the HabitGold app by selecting the quantity of gold you want to sell.
What price will I receive when selling gold?
You will receive the live selling price displayed on the platform at the time of the transaction.
How long does it take to receive money after selling gold?
The proceeds are typically transferred to your bank account within the platform’s settlement timeline.
Can I convert digital gold into physical gold?
Yes. Users may convert digital gold into physical gold such as coins or bars.
What purity is the physical gold delivered?
Physical gold is typically delivered as 24K high-purity gold.
Minting, logistics, and delivery charges may apply when converting digital gold to physical gold. Above 5 gm free delivery.
Who provides the gold available on HabitGold?
The gold is sourced through authorized gold partners who maintain the infrastructure for secure storage and transactions.
Is my gold backed by physical gold?
Yes. Every digital gold purchase corresponds to physical gold stored on behalf of users.
The stored gold is 100% insured against risks such as theft or loss.
What is the HabitGold reward system?
HabitGold offers rewards or incentives to users for purchasing gold through the platform.
What is the HabitGold Gold Partner Program?
The Gold Partner Program allows you to refer HabitGold to others and earn rewards whenever they purchase gold in the future.
Who can join the Gold Partner Program?
Anyone can join the Gold Partner Program and earn rewards by bringing new users to the app.
Are you sure you want to logout? You can sign back in anytime with your registered mobile number.
Verify your identity to enable %1$s login
Your account will remain accessible for 30 days. You can log in again during that time.
This action is permanent. To continue, type HABITGOLD below.
Please sell or deliver your gold balance before requesting account deletion.
We could not refresh your profile right now. Tap to retry.
Your legal name is locked after signup.
Enter full name as on PAN
Enter the name exactly as on PAN.
Turn on biometric protection so only you can open HabitGold on this device.
Confirm your identity to manage biometric protection.
Use your device fingerprint or face unlock whenever it is available.
HabitGold will rely on the biometric option already enrolled on this device. If biometrics are unavailable, your device security settings will determine access.
Are you sure you want to turn off biometric protection for HabitGold on this device?
Your app lock settings were updated.
That MPIN did not match. Try again.
New UPI IDs are added automatically after completing a UPI payment.
Credits add to your balance. Debits show redemptions and expired rewards.
Could not load rewards right now.
Refer & earn rewards when friends join
Milestones done — tap below to turn on your booster.
Extra cashback after you finish all milestones.
Drag sliders to see potential rewards
Scan to share your referral code
No coins currently available for delivery.
You need more gold in your locker to redeem this coin.
Coupon %1$s applied! Free delivery on 5g+ coins.
Coupon %1$s is only valid for coins 5g and above.
Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your phone number to verify this address.
Delivery is not available for this address. Verification status must be PINCODE_SERVICEABLE.
No active deliveries found to track.
Failed to load orders. Please try again.
Shipment prepared by the vault team
Package will start moving once picked up
Address details will appear once available.
Could not read new address ID.
Select an address and a coin to continue.
Quote expired. Please refresh the quote.
Missing order ID for payment verification.
Payment was cancelled. You can review and try again.
Payment verification timed out. Please check tracking.
We're confirming your transaction with the bank. This usually takes a few seconds.
Please do not close the app or press back
Your gold balance covers the coin value. Delivery charges are free over 5 grams.
Select where we should deliver your gold coin
Address locked for this active quote
Your gold coin will be dispatched within the estimated time.
